onset.Description: Onset (in seconds) of the event measured from the beginning of the acquisition of the first volume in the corresponding task imaging data file.

duration.Description: Duration of the event (measured from onset) in seconds

sample.Description: Onset of the event in samples.

value.Description: Marker value associated with the event.

Levels.prompt_t2: Task to report visibility of T2

trial_index.Description: Number of the trial in which this event occurred.

dual_task.Description: Whether this was a single task or dual task trial.

t2presence.Description: Whether this trial contained a T2 stimulus.

soa_long.Description: Whether this trial has a long or short stimulus onset asynchrony.

stimulus.Description: The stimulus character string. Empty for task events.

vis_rating.Description: The rating provided by the participant of the visibility of T2; values 0-20.

vis_init.Description: Initial Position of the Visibility Prompt Slider; values 0-20.

correct.Description: Whether the response to the T1 Identity Prompt was correct.
